name: Georgia Peanut Butter Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine sugar, milk, peanut butter, vanilla, and egg yolks. Beat on low speed until well blended.
3. In a small bowl, beat the egg whites until stiff and fold into the peanut butter mixture.
4. Spoon the mixture into the pie crust.
5. Bake at 375°F for 30 to 35 minutes.
6. Cool completely.
7. Cover with whipped cream and garnish with chopped nuts.
8. Chill.
